meanings.definition: the bottom of a shoe or boot; the back part of a shoe or boot that touches the ground and provides elevation
the back part of the human foot
one of the crusty ends of a loaf of bread
the lower end of a ship's mast
(golf) the part of the clubhead where it joins the shaft

examples: the wind made the vessel heel

meanings.definition: follow at the heels of a person
strike with the heel of the club
